entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being bred for resistance to fungal infection and toxin contamination

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungus responsible for seed colonization and aflatoxin production in groundnuts

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnut seeds caused by A. flavus

entities.name: SEED COLONIZATION
entities.description: The process by which A. flavus infects the seeds of groundnuts

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to resist A. flavus infection and aflatoxin production

entities.name: TESTA RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to A. flavus infection specifically located in the testae of mature seeds

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics where the research was conducted

entities.name: IN VITRO SEED COLONIZATION
entities.description: A laboratory-based method used to identify genotypes resistant to A. flavus

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of crossing resistant genotypes with susceptible cultivars to produce improved lines

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the groundnut breeding lines

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The standard and characteristics of the groundnut breeding lines

entities.name: GENETICS OF INHERITANCE
entities.description: The study of how resistance traits are passed from parents to offspring
